summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HUD Ring Animation interface fixes. Major improvement from 75% to 100% success rate for core ring segment functionality. All Ring 2 Operations and Ring 3 Knowledge segments now clickable and open correct panels. Minor issues remain with side panel close button positioning and some overlay interference.

ui_bugs.issue: Close button occasionally positioned outside viewport (x: 2221) causing accessibility issues
Close button sometimes fails to close panel even when positioned correctly

integration_issues.issue: Manual segment requires force click - possible minor overlay interference

passed_tests: All Ring 2 Operations segments clickable and open correct panels (Manual, Encyclopedia, Memory, System Monitor, Customization, Explore Mode)
All Ring 3 Knowledge segments clickable and open correct panels (Subjects, Lab, Projects, Blueprints, Systems, Archive)
Side panel content mapping correct for all segments
Most Ring 2 segments clickable without force (Encyclopedia, System Monitor)
Panel titles display correctly (Memory Bank, Preferences, Project Workspace, Data Archive)
HUD renders with all 3 rings visible and properly positioned
AI status display shows current AI (Ajani) correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix side panel close button positioning to ensure it stays within viewport bounds. Investigate close button click handler to ensure reliable panel closing. Minor: resolve overlay interference for Manual segment requiring force clicks.
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - Core functionality fully working, minor close button and overlay issues remain
